verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc hæc dicit Dominus  creans te, Jacob,  et formans te, Israël :  Noli timere, quia redemi te,  et vocavi te nomine tuo : meus es tu.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֞ה כֹּֽה־אָמַ֤ר יְהֹוָה֙ בֹּרַאֲךָ֣ יַעֲקֹ֔ב וְיֹצֶרְךָ֖ יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל אַל־תִּירָא֙ כִּ֣י גְאַלְתִּ֔יךָ קָרָ֥אתִי בְשִׁמְךָ֖ לִי־אָֽתָּה׃
verses.king_james: But now thus saith the Lord that created thee, O Jacob, and he that formed thee, O Israel, Fear not: for I have redeemed thee, I have called thee by thy name; thou art mine.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum transieris per aquas, tecum ero,  et flumina non operient te ;  cum ambulaveris in igne, non combureris, et flamma non ardebit in te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־תַעֲבֹ֤ר בַּמַּ֙יִם֙ אִתְּךָ־אָ֔נִי וּבַנְּהָר֖וֹת לֹ֣א יִשְׁטְפ֑וּךָ כִּֽי־תֵלֵ֤ךְ בְּמוֹ־אֵשׁ֙ לֹ֣א תִכָּוֶ֔ה וְלֶהָבָ֖ה לֹ֥א תִבְעַר־בָּֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: When thou passest through the waters, I will be with thee; and through the rivers, they shall not overflow thee: when thou walkest through the fire, thou shalt not be burned; neither shall the flame kindle upon thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia ego Dominus Deus tuus,  Sanctus Israël, salvator tuus,  dedi propitiationem tuam Ægyptum,  Æthopiam, et Saba, pro te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֗י אֲנִי֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֔יךָ קְד֥וֹשׁ יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל מוֹשִׁיעֶ֑ךָ נָתַ֤תִּי כׇפְרְךָ֙ מִצְרַ֔יִם כּ֥וּשׁ וּסְבָ֖א תַּחְתֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: For I am the Lord thy God, the Holy One of Israel, thy Saviour: I gave Egypt for thy ransom, Ethiopia and Seba for thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ex quo honorabilis factus es in oculis meis,  et gloriosus, ego dilexi te,  et dabo homines pro te,  et populos pro anima tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵאֲשֶׁ֨ר יָקַ֧רְתָּ בְעֵינַ֛י נִכְבַּ֖דְתָּ וַאֲנִ֣י אֲהַבְתִּ֑יךָ וְאֶתֵּ֤ן אָדָם֙ תַּחְתֶּ֔יךָ וּלְאֻמִּ֖ים תַּ֥חַת נַפְשֶֽׁךָ׃
verses.king_james: Since thou wast precious in my sight, thou hast been honourable, and I have loved thee: therefore will I give men for thee, and people for thy life.

verses.latin_vulgate: Noli timere, quia ego tecum sum ;  ab oriente adducam semen tuum,  et ab occidente congregabo te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּירָ֖א כִּ֣י אִתְּךָ־אָ֑נִי מִמִּזְרָח֙ אָבִ֣יא זַרְעֶ֔ךָ וּמִֽמַּעֲרָ֖ב אֲקַבְּצֶֽךָּ׃
verses.king_james: Fear not: for I am with thee: I will bring thy seed from the east, and gather thee from the west;

verses.latin_vulgate: Dicam aquiloni : Da ;  et austro : Noli prohibere :  affer filios meos de longinquo,  et filias meas ab extremis terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹמַ֤ר לַצָּפוֹן֙ תֵּ֔נִי וּלְתֵימָ֖ן אַל־תִּכְלָ֑אִי הָבִ֤יאִי בָנַי֙ מֵרָח֔וֹק וּבְנוֹתַ֖י מִקְצֵ֥ה הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: I will say to the north, Give up; and to the south, Keep not back: bring my sons from far, and my daughters from the ends of the earth;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et omnem qui invocat nomen meum,  in gloriam meam creavi eum, formavi eum, et feci eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֚ל הַנִּקְרָ֣א בִשְׁמִ֔י וְלִכְבוֹדִ֖י בְּרָאתִ֑יו יְצַרְתִּ֖יו אַף־עֲשִׂיתִֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Even every one that is called by my name: for I have created him for my glory, I have formed him; yea, I have made him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Educ foras populum cæcum, et oculos habentem ;  surdum, et aures ei sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹצִ֥יא עַם־עִוֵּ֖ר וְעֵינַ֣יִם יֵ֑שׁ וְחֵרְשִׁ֖ים וְאׇזְנַ֥יִם לָֽמוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Bring forth the blind people that have eyes, and the deaf that have ears.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes gentes congregatæ sunt simul,  et collectæ sunt tribus.  Quis in vobis annuntiet istud,  et quæ prima sunt audire nos faciet ?  Dent testes eorum, justificentur,  et audiant, et dicant : Vere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּֽל־הַגּוֹיִ֞ם נִקְבְּצ֣וּ יַחְדָּ֗ו וְיֵאָֽסְפוּ֙ לְאֻמִּ֔ים מִ֤י בָהֶם֙ יַגִּ֣יד זֹ֔את וְרִאשֹׁנ֖וֹת יַשְׁמִיעֻ֑נוּ יִתְּנ֤וּ עֵֽדֵיהֶם֙ וְיִצְדָּ֔קוּ וְיִשְׁמְע֖וּ וְיֹאמְר֥וּ אֱמֶֽת׃
verses.king_james: Let all the nations be gathered together, and let the people be assembled: who among them can declare this, and shew us former things? let them bring forth their witnesses, that they may be justified: or let them hear, and say, It is truth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vos testes mei, dicit Dominus,  et servus meus quem elegi :  ut sciatis, et credatis mihi,  et intelligatis quia ego ipse sum ;  ante me non est formatus Deus,  et post me non erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתֶּ֤ם עֵדַי֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה וְעַבְדִּ֖י אֲשֶׁ֣ר בָּחָ֑רְתִּי לְמַ֣עַן תֵּ֠דְע֠וּ וְתַאֲמִ֨ינוּ לִ֤י וְתָבִ֙ינוּ֙ כִּֽי־אֲנִ֣י ה֔וּא לְפָנַי֙ לֹא־נ֣וֹצַר אֵ֔ל וְאַחֲרַ֖י לֹ֥א יִהְיֶֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Ye are my witnesses, saith the Lord, and my servant whom I have chosen: that ye may know and believe me, and understand that I am he: before me there was no God formed, neither shall there be after me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego sum, ego sum Dominus,  et non est absque me salvator.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָנֹכִ֥י אָנֹכִ֖י יְהֹוָ֑ה וְאֵ֥ין מִבַּלְעָדַ֖י מוֹשִֽׁיעַ׃
verses.king_james: I, even I, am the Lord; and beside me there is no saviour.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego annuntiavi, et salvavi ; auditum feci,  et non fuit in vobis alienus :  vos testes mei, dicit Dominus,  et ego Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָנֹכִ֞י הִגַּ֤דְתִּי וְהוֹשַׁ֙עְתִּי֙ וְהִשְׁמַ֔עְתִּי וְאֵ֥ין בָּכֶ֖ם זָ֑ר וְאַתֶּ֥ם עֵדַ֛י נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֖ה וַאֲנִי־אֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: I have declared, and have saved, and I have shewed, when there was no strange god among you: therefore ye are my witnesses, saith the Lord, that I am God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ab initio ego ipse,  et non est qui de manu mea eruat.  Operabor, et quis avertet illud ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־מִיּוֹם֙ אֲנִ֣י ה֔וּא וְאֵ֥ין מִיָּדִ֖י מַצִּ֑יל אֶפְעַ֖ל וּמִ֥י יְשִׁיבֶֽנָּה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Yea, before the day was I am he; and there is none that can deliver out of my hand: I will work, and who shall let it?

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus, redemptor vester,  Sanctus Israël :  Propter vos misi in Babylonem,  et detraxi vectes universos,  et Chaldæos in navibus suis gloriantes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּֽה־אָמַ֧ר יְהֹוָ֛ה גֹּאַלְכֶ֖ם קְד֣וֹשׁ יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל לְמַעַנְכֶ֞ם שִׁלַּ֣חְתִּי בָבֶ֗לָה וְהוֹרַדְתִּ֤י בָֽרִיחִים֙ כֻּלָּ֔ם וְכַשְׂדִּ֖ים בָּאֳנִיּ֥וֹת רִנָּתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord, your redeemer, the Holy One of Israel; For your sake I have sent to Babylon, and have brought down all their nobles, and the Chaldeans, whose cry is in the ships.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego Dominus, Sanctus vester,  creans Israël, rex vester.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה קְדֽוֹשְׁכֶ֑ם בּוֹרֵ֥א יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל מַלְכְּכֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: I am the Lord, your Holy One, the creator of Israel, your King.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus,  qui dedit in mari viam,  et in aquis torrentibus semitam ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֚ה אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה הַנּוֹתֵ֥ן בַּיָּ֖ם דָּ֑רֶךְ וּבְמַ֥יִם עַזִּ֖ים נְתִיבָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord, which maketh a way in the sea, and a path in the mighty waters;

verses.latin_vulgate: qui eduxit quadrigam et equum,  agmen et robustum :  simul obdormierunt, nec resurgent ;  contriti sunt quasi linum, et extincti sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַמּוֹצִ֥יא רֶכֶב־וָס֖וּס חַ֣יִל וְעִזּ֑וּז יַחְדָּ֤ו יִשְׁכְּבוּ֙ בַּל־יָק֔וּמוּ דָּעֲכ֖וּ כַּפִּשְׁתָּ֥ה כָבֽוּ׃
verses.king_james: Which bringeth forth the chariot and horse, the army and the power; they shall lie down together, they shall not rise: they are extinct, they are quenched as tow.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne memineritis priorum,  et antiqua ne intueamini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַֽל־תִּזְכְּר֖וּ רִאשֹׁנ֑וֹת וְקַדְמֹנִיּ֖וֹת אַל־תִּתְבֹּנָֽנוּ׃
verses.king_james: Remember ye not the former things, neither consider the things of old.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce ego facio nova,  et nunc orientur, utique cognoscetis ea :  ponam in deserto viam,  et in invio flumina.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנְנִ֨י עֹשֶׂ֤ה חֲדָשָׁה֙ עַתָּ֣ה תִצְמָ֔ח הֲל֖וֹא תֵּדָע֑וּהָ אַ֣ף אָשִׂ֤ים בַּמִּדְבָּר֙ דֶּ֔רֶךְ בִּישִׁמ֖וֹן נְהָרֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: Behold, I will do a new thing; now it shall spring forth; shall ye not know it? I will even make a way in the wilderness, and rivers in the desert.

verses.latin_vulgate: Glorificabit me bestia agri,  dracones, et struthiones :  quia dedi in deserto aquas,  flumina in invio,  ut darem potum populo meo, electo meo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּכַבְּדֵ֙נִי֙ חַיַּ֣ת הַשָּׂדֶ֔ה תַּנִּ֖ים וּבְנ֣וֹת יַעֲנָ֑ה כִּֽי־נָתַ֨תִּי בַמִּדְבָּ֜ר מַ֗יִם נְהָרוֹת֙ בִּֽישִׁימֹ֔ן לְהַשְׁק֖וֹת עַמִּ֥י בְחִירִֽי׃
verses.king_james: The beast of the field shall honour me, the dragons and the owls: because I give waters in the wilderness, and rivers in the desert, to give drink to my people, my chosen.

verses.latin_vulgate: Populum istum formavi mihi :  laudem meam narrabit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַם־זוּ֙ יָצַ֣רְתִּי לִ֔י תְּהִלָּתִ֖י יְסַפֵּֽרוּ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: This people have I formed for myself; they shall shew forth my praise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non me invocasti, Jacob,  nec laborasti in me, Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־אֹתִ֥י קָרָ֖אתָ יַעֲקֹ֑ב כִּֽי־יָגַ֥עְתָּ בִּ֖י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: But thou hast not called upon me, O Jacob; but thou hast been weary of me, O Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non obtulisti mihi arietem holocausti tui,  et victimis tuis non glorificasti me ;  non te servire feci in oblatione,  nec laborem tibi præbui in thure.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־הֵבֵ֤יאתָ לִּי֙ שֵׂ֣ה עֹלֹתֶ֔יךָ וּזְבָחֶ֖יךָ לֹ֣א כִבַּדְתָּ֑נִי לֹ֤א הֶעֱבַדְתִּ֙יךָ֙ בְּמִנְחָ֔ה וְלֹ֥א הוֹגַעְתִּ֖יךָ בִּלְבוֹנָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast not brought me the small cattle of thy burnt offerings; neither hast thou honoured me with thy sacrifices. I have not caused thee to serve with an offering, nor wearied thee with incense.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non emisti mihi argento calamum,  et adipe victimarum tuarum non inebriasti me :  verumtamen servire me fecisti in peccatis tuis ;  præbuisti mihi laborem in iniquitatibus tuis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־קָנִ֨יתָ לִּ֤י בַכֶּ֙סֶף֙ קָנֶ֔ה וְחֵ֥לֶב זְבָחֶ֖יךָ לֹ֣א הִרְוִיתָ֑נִי אַ֗ךְ הֶעֱבַדְתַּ֙נִי֙ בְּחַטֹּאותֶ֔יךָ הוֹגַעְתַּ֖נִי בַּעֲוֺנֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast bought me no sweet cane with money, neither hast thou filled me with the fat of thy sacrifices: but thou hast made me to serve with thy sins, thou hast wearied me with thine iniquities.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego sum, ego sum ipse qui deleo iniquitates tuas propter me,  et peccatorum tuorum non recordabor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָנֹכִ֨י אָנֹכִ֥י ה֛וּא מֹחֶ֥ה פְשָׁעֶ֖יךָ לְמַעֲנִ֑י וְחַטֹּאתֶ֖יךָ לֹ֥א אֶזְכֹּֽר׃
verses.king_james: I, even I, am he that blotteth out thy transgressions for mine own sake, and will not remember thy sins.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reduc me in memoriam, et judicemur simul :  narra si quid habes ut justificeris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַזְכִּירֵ֕נִי נִשָּׁפְטָ֖ה יָ֑חַד סַפֵּ֥ר אַתָּ֖ה לְמַ֥עַן תִּצְדָּֽק׃
verses.king_james: Put me in remembrance: let us plead together: declare thou, that thou mayest be justified.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pater tuus primus peccavit,  et interpretes tui prævaricati sunt in me :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָבִ֥יךָ הָרִאשׁ֖וֹן חָטָ֑א וּמְלִיצֶ֖יךָ פָּ֥שְׁעוּ בִֽי׃
verses.king_james: Thy first father hath sinned, and thy teachers have transgressed against me.

verses.latin_vulgate: et contaminavi principes sanctos ;  dedi ad internecionem Jacob,  et Israël in blasphemiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲחַלֵּ֖ל שָׂ֣רֵי קֹ֑דֶשׁ וְאֶתְּנָ֤ה לַחֵ֙רֶם֙ יַֽעֲקֹ֔ב וְיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לְגִדּוּפִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Therefore I have profaned the princes of the sanctuary, and have given Jacob to the curse, and Israel to reproaches.
